response.step_by_step_log: Watched the entire video. The video consists of dialogue by four holoX members discussing their 4th anniversary and announcing a 3D concert. No singing or vocal performance was identified. Therefore, no song searches were conducted.
response.global_summary: A promotional video segment for the 4th anniversary of Secret Society holoX, featuring members Laplus Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, and Sakamata Chloe announcing their 2026 First MISSION concert. No vocal music was detected in this segment; it is entirely composed of spoken dialogue and background instrumentals.

scenes.description: Four VTubers (Laplus, Lui, Koyori, Chloe) stand on a stage for a 4th anniversary announcement, speaking directly to the audience. Text '#SSholoX4周年' appears in the top-right.
